title: Stripe – Financial Infrastructure to Grow Your Revenue

title: Usage-Based Billing | Stripe Billing
meta_description: Stripe's usage-based billing lets you launch flexible pricing models fast, track real-time usage, prevent fraud, and scale revenue with confidence.
h1: Turn usage into revenue with Stripe’s usage-based billing. Launch fast, scale confidently, and keep pricing flexible.
h2s: Quickly launch new pricing and products.Save months of development time, and support any pricing model.
Optimize pricing with real-time data.Track usage and revenue to see what’s working, test new approaches, and adjust quickly based on what you learn.
Protect margins and build customer trust.Catch revenue leaks before they add up, and give customers a clear view into what they use and what they owe.
Scale on a unified, reliable revenue platform.With high-volume usage ingestion and industry-leading uptime, Stripe keeps up as you grow.
Optimize every step of your revenue cycle with Stripe

target_audience: SaaS founders, product managers, and finance teams looking to implement usage-based or consumption pricing models
